c.d: The range of devices and operating systems the app supports, indicating its accessibility across different hardware.
The number of games available on the platform, reflecting the variety of gaming options.
c.s: Official app websites, gaming news outlets

c.d: The maximum resolution and frame rate supported by the app, affecting the visual and performance experience.
The monthly or annual fee required to access the service, impacting affordability.
The average delay between user input and on-screen response, crucial for gameplay responsiveness.
The presence of games available only on the platform, offering unique gaming experiences.
c.s: Official app websites, gaming news outlets

c.d: The design and usability of the app's interface, influencing ease of navigation and overall user experience.
The ability to download and play games without an internet connection, providing flexibility.
Compatibility with various gaming controllers, enhancing gameplay options.
Whether the service offers a trial period at no cost, allowing users to evaluate before subscribing.
